## Summary

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm run format:check`
- [ ] `pnpm run lint`
- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm run test:unit:coverage`
- [ ] `pnpm run build`
- [ ] Other:

## Acceptance

- [ ] The change is focused and avoids unrelated rewrites.
- [ ] Public behavior changes are documented.
- [ ] Tests cover the changed parser, converter, formatter, linter, provider, or webview behavior.
- [ ] Webview changes keep a restrictive content security policy and VS Code theme variables.
- [ ] No secrets, local prompts, transcripts, scratch files, generated credentials, or packaged local artifacts are included.
- [ ] Release, marketplace, or packaging impact is noted when applicable.

## Notes
